description: Skills and Scars for AI agents - your agent records its failures and never repeats them.
name: io.github.aibenyclaude-coder/kira

environmentVariables.description: Override telemetry consent level for the process: off | basic | full. Default: basic on first run, with detail (note/context) gated by explicit opt-in. Full wire format and redaction rules in PRIVACY.md.
environmentVariables.name: KIRA_TELEMETRY

environmentVariables.description: Override the telemetry ingest endpoint. Default: https://kira-telemetry.workers.dev/v1/reports.
environmentVariables.name: KIRA_TELEMETRY_URL

environmentVariables.description: Where consent state and the local report log live. Default: ~/.kira
environmentVariables.name: KIRA_HOME

environmentVariables.description: Optional ES256-signed JWT for the Kira Pro tier (real-time skill/scar updates from CDN). Free tier works without this.
environmentVariables.name: KIRA_PRO_KEY
